title: Sweet and Sour Dill Pickle Empanada
description: A rich, velvety, nostalgic Argentinian dish featuring dill pickles in a unique sugar-free-friendly Sweet and Sour sauce, perfect for snacking.
instructions: Place the sliced dill pickles in a shallow dish and drizzle with half of the sweet and sour sauce. Toss to coat evenly.
Carefully place the coated dill pickles into the air fryer basket, ensuring they are not overcrowded. Fry for 5-7 minutes or until golden brown and crispy.

While the dill pickles are frying, prepare the flour tortillas by heating a little oil in a skillet over medium heat. Place one tortilla at a time and cook until lightly golden on both sides, about 30 seconds to 1 minute per side.
Spread a small amount of sweet and sour sauce evenly onto each tortilla, leaving a border around the edges for sealing.
Gently fold in half to enclose the dill pickles, ensuring they are well-encased. Place sealed empanadas back into the air fryer basket.
Fry the empanadas for an additional 2-3 minutes or until cooked through and golden brown on all sides.
Remove from the heat and serve hot as a snack.
